title: Fang (dinko)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the [[Dinko (creature)|dinko]]|[[Fang (disambiguation)|other uses of the word]]}}
'''Fang''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dinko (creature)|dinko]]. It participated in [[dinko fighting]] where [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] won some [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] off it in a bet.

==Sources==
